title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・最後の大一番

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap manages to defeat Tamamo Cross in
the illustrious autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next big race against Super Creek, the Arima
Kinen, awaits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to keep winning, for the sake of
everyone waiting for her to get stronger.
